name: zoom-automation
description: Automate Zoom meeting creation, management, recordings, webinars, and participant tracking via Rube MCP (Composio). Always search tools first for current schemas.
capabilities: Create and schedule Zoom meetings with custom settings (topic, time, duration, timezone)
List and manage meetings by type (scheduled, live, upcoming, previous)
Retrieve, list, and delete cloud recordings with date range filtering
Get past meeting participants and daily usage reports
Manage webinars including listing and participant registration
Handle meeting UUIDs, pagination tokens, and ISO 8601 time formatting
author: sickn33
securitySummary: Static analyzer detected 186 pattern matches but all are FALSE POSITIVES. The SKILL.md file is documentation (markdown), not executable code. Backtick detections are markdown code formatting syntax, not shell execution. The skill uses MCP tools to call Zoom API - no direct command execution. One legitimate network reference exists (Rube MCP endpoint URL in documentation) which is expected for an MCP-based skill.
valueStatement: Stop manually managing Zoom meetings and recordings. This skill automates meeting scheduling, participant tracking, and recording management through Zoom's API via MCP tools.
limitations: Requires Rube MCP server connection (https://rube.app/mcp) for Zoom API access
Most features require paid Zoom account (Pro plan or higher)
Webinar features require separate Webinar add-on subscription
AI meeting summaries require AI Companion feature enabled on account

useCases.title: Executive Assistant
useCases.description: Automate weekly meeting scheduling, send join URLs to participants, and retrieve recordings for absent team members.

useCases.title: Training Coordinator
useCases.description: Schedule recurring training webinars, register participants automatically, and track attendance reports.

useCases.title: Sales Operations
useCases.description: Create client meeting links on demand, retrieve call recordings for coaching, and generate usage reports.

promptTemplates.title: Schedule a One-Time Meeting
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a Zoom meeting for [TOPIC] on [DATE] at [TIME] for [DURATION] minutes. Add [EMAIL1] and [EMAIL2] as invitees. Enable waiting room and cloud recording.
promptTemplates.scenario: Quick meeting setup with standard security settings

promptTemplates.title: List Upcoming Meetings
promptTemplates.prompt: Show me all my upcoming Zoom meetings for the next week. Include meeting IDs and join URLs.
promptTemplates.scenario: Review scheduled meetings before a busy week

promptTemplates.title: Get Meeting Recording
promptTemplates.prompt: Find the cloud recording for my meeting on [DATE] about [TOPIC]. Provide the download URL and share link.
promptTemplates.scenario: Retrieve recording to share with absent participants

promptTemplates.title: Webinar Registration Report
promptTemplates.prompt: List all my upcoming webinars. For each webinar, show me the number of registered participants and their email addresses.

bestPractices: Always call RUBE_SEARCH_TOOLS first to get current tool schemas before executing workflows
Verify Zoom connection status is ACTIVE via RUBE_MANAGE_CONNECTIONS before running operations
Use 'me' as userId for user-level apps and follow pagination tokens until empty for complete results
antiPatterns: Do not hardcode meeting IDs - always retrieve current IDs via list endpoints to avoid stale data
Do not assume start_url is permanent - it expires in 2 hours and must be regenerated
Do not use page_number parameter - it is deprecated; use next_page_token for pagination instead

faq.question: Do I need API keys to use this skill?
faq.answer: No API keys needed. Add https://rube.app/mcp as an MCP server in your client configuration. The skill handles Zoom OAuth automatically through RUBE_MANAGE_CONNECTIONS.

faq.question: What Zoom plan do I need?
faq.answer: Basic features work on free accounts. Pro plan or higher is required for cloud recordings, participant reports, and most automation features. Webinar add-on is required for webinar management.

faq.question: How do I connect my Zoom account?
faq.answer: Call RUBE_MANAGE_CONNECTIONS with toolkit 'zoom'. If not ACTIVE, follow the returned OAuth link to authorize. Confirm ACTIVE status before running workflows.

faq.question: Why are my meeting times in UTC?
faq.answer: Zoom stores all times in UTC internally. Provide timezone field with start_time for local time input. The skill handles conversion automatically.

faq.question: Can I register participants automatically?
faq.answer: Yes, use ZOOM_ADD_A_MEETING_REGISTRANT or ZOOM_ADD_A_WEBINAR_REGISTRANT. Registration must be enabled on the meeting/webinar for these tools to work.

faq.question: How long do meeting recordings last?
faq.answer: Cloud recordings are stored based on your Zoom plan settings. The skill can list, retrieve, or delete recordings. Download URLs require authentication for passcode-protected recordings.
